title: Latest LLM Advances: GPT-5 and Claude Opus 4
raw_html:
Latest LLM Advances

OpenAI announced GPT-5 with 10T parameters, showing remarkable improvements in reasoning and multi-modal capabilities. Meanwhile, Anthropic released Claude Opus 4 with extended context windows up to 1M tokens.

Key Developments

  • GPT-5 achieves 95% accuracy on MMLU benchmark
  • Claude Opus 4 supports 1M token context
  • New fine-tuning methods reduce training costs by 40%

These advances signal a new era in AI capabilities, particularly for complex reasoning tasks and long-context processing.
raw_text:
Latest LLM Advances: GPT-5 and Claude Opus 4

OpenAI announced GPT-5 with 10T parameters, showing remarkable improvements in reasoning and multi-modal capabilities. Meanwhile, Anthropic released Claude Opus 4 with extended context windows up to 1M tokens.

Key Developments:
- GPT-5 achieves 95% accuracy on MMLU benchmark
- Claude Opus 4 supports 1M token context
- New fine-tuning methods reduce training costs by 40%

These advances signal a new era in AI capabilities, particularly for complex reasoning tasks and long-context processing.
